nodes.label: Tests for agent/curator.py — orchestrator, idle gating, state transitions.  LL
Isolated HERMES_HOME + freshly reloaded curator + skill_usage modules.

A run older than the configured interval should re-trigger. Use a     2x-interv
A freshly-created skill with no use history should not get archived     just be
Manual skills can have usage records, but without the agent-created     marker
Dry-run previews must not bump last_run_at or run_count. A preview     shouldn'
The dry-run prompt must carry a banner instructing the LLM not to     call any
Dry-run must not call apply_automatic_transitions — the auto pass     archives
Fresh install (no curator state file) must NOT fire the curator on     the firs
Core invariants must be in the review prompt text.
The review prompt must rely on existing tools (skill_manage + terminal)     and
Pinning is a user opt-out, not a model decision. The prompt should     not tell
The curator prompt must push umbrella-building / class-level thinking,     not
Support-file demotion (references/templates/scripts) must be one of     the thr
hermes curator unpin must refuse bundled/hub skills too (matches pin).
auxiliary.curator absent (or auto/empty) → use main model.provider/model.
auxiliary.curator.{provider,model} fully set → that pair wins.

Falling through to main model must not pick up stray auxiliary.curator secrets.
